  "society_power": 7.6,
  "state_power": 7.8,
  "society_change": 0.4,
  "state_change": -1.5,
  "key_event": "Rise of labor movements and political fragmentation",
  "reasoning": "Economic growth and labor movements strengthened civil society, while political fragmentation and the 1905 earthquake weakened the state."
